name: tamarind-mcp
description: Run 300+ Tamarind Bio protein and molecular-science tools through the authenticated MCP server — structure prediction, design, docking, and analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Run 300+ protein and molecular-science tools on Tamarind Bio — structure prediction, design, docking, and analysis.
interface.longDescription: Connect ChatGPT to your Tamarind Bio workspace for computational protein and molecular science. Validate, estimate, submit, and monitor jobs across 300+ tools — structure prediction (AlphaFold, Chai-1, Boltz-2, ESMFold, OpenFold3), protein and binder design (RFdiffusion, ProteinMPNN, BindCraft), docking (AutoDock Vina, DiffDock, GNINA), molecular dynamics, antibody and enzyme workflows, and property prediction (solubility, thermostability, developability). Chain tools into pipelines (e.g. ProteinMPNN → AlphaFold/Chai) and run many inputs as a single batch. Browse and upload workspace files, and pull back results, output files, and logs — all from chat.
defaultPrompt: Design a de novo nanobody binder to block PD-L1
Fold this sequence with AlphaFold and tell me the pLDDT: MKTVRQ…
Dock my binder to a target structure
Design 8 binders to receptor.pdb with RFdiffusion, run ProteinMPNN, then fold the top 3 with Chai
Predict solubility and thermostability for these five sequences
Predict ADME properties for my small-molecule candidates
Generate antibody variants for affinity maturation
Show my last 10 jobs and download the results from my BindCraft run
